text.title: AI-Enhanced Design Systems (UX/UI) Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying ai-enhanced-design-systems. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Figma library drifts from code; designer assumes parity.
antipattern.fix: Wire Figma-to-code diff; block merge on drift.

antipattern.symptom: AI runs on inconsistent system; locks in chaos.

antipattern.fix: Cap variants; tier by token axes.

antipattern.symptom: Hallucinated a11y claim in public docs.
